## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an "x" -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary (complex logic only)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors

### COBRA Styling (Frontend changes)

- [ ] No raw MUI components used (using COBRA styled components)
- [ ] All spacing uses `CobraStyles` constants
- [ ] All colors use `theme.palette.*`
- [ ] Correct button types used (CobraDeleteButton, CobraSaveButton, etc.)

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have updated CLAUDE.md if AI-relevant patterns changed

### Testing

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

### Deployment

- [ ] I have verified my changes work in the staging environment
- [ ] I have tested the health check endpoint after deployment (if backend changes)

## Additional Notes

<!-- Any additional information for reviewers -->

---

**Reviewer Guidelines:**
1. Verify all acceptance criteria from linked user stories are met
2. Check COBRA styling compliance for frontend changes
3. Verify logging is appropriate for backend changes
4. Ensure no secrets or sensitive data are committed
